description: Likely extracts or classifies a compact property of the input rather than reproducing the whole canvas. Colors are preserved as a set, though positions may change. Primary structural cue: compact output. Inferred transformation family: extract/count/select. The rule is uncertain and needs task-specific review.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_88a62173(I):
    x1 = lefthalf(I)
    x2 = righthalf(I)
    x3 = tophalf(x1)
    x4 = tophalf(x2)
    x5 = bottomhalf(x1)
    x6 = bottomhalf(x2)
    x7 = astuple(x3, x4)
    x8 = astuple(x5, x6)
    x9 = combine(x7, x8)
    O = leastcommon(x9)
    return O
